content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Accepted the amendment because the described dirty/staged worktree outcome follows from the current soft-reset and filtered commit flow.

## Votes

- `fr-5-e92356ae`: Accept
  The code soft-resets to origin/master, which stages all checkpoint changes, but then filters commit paths through review_scope_paths, excluding .ralph-burning and .beads. A path-limited git commit will not include those excluded staged files, so generated state can remain staged after a successful push/PR open. That leaves the drain loop in an unpredictable dirty state; the command should either include all squashed checkpoint paths in the commit while filtering only review text/stats, or explicitly clean/unstage excluded generated paths before success.
